ksa_text: Knowledge of database management system (DBMS) principles and practices, including data persistence, transaction management, index optimization, query performance tuning, backup and recovery procedures, and data retention policies.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DQ-K-014 (DQ, Knowledge) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4207 is insufficient to establish relevance to bioinformatics analysis, genomic data processing, and life sciences analytics at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (nice=0.421, eu_ai_act=0.416, ddat=0.405) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: DQ domain KSA DQ-K-014 excluded at composite 0.4207, but KSA text contains direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency: the presence of analytics terminology in a moderate fit KSA at score 0.4207 suggests the threshold is excluding genuinely relevant content.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.4207 with confirmed analytics-domain terminology for a DQ (moderate fit) KSA indicates real role relevance for Bioinformatics Technician. The 0.43 threshold is a calibration heuristic; text-signal confirmation overrides marginal score shortfall at this level.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude overturned. DQ KSA with composite 0.4207 and confirmed analytics-domain text signals included on internal consistency grounds.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA DQ-K-014 (DQ, composite 0.4207) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with DCAT-AP, DAMA DMBOK data quality competency framework; DQ awareness is a documented expectation in senior IC analyst roles. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4207 with signal across nice=0.421, eu_ai_act=0.416, ddat=0.405 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from DQ-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Bioinformatics Technician at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: include. Composite 0.4207, domain DQ. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
